title: calcitrapa vulgaris
intro: Calcitrapa vulgaris, also known as nasturtium, is a flowering annual plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of calcitrapa vulgaris include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
